title: Movement Roadmap
subtitle: Public narrative milestones for the WeAreSwarm movement — belief, ladder, and ascension arcs. Not the live ops queue.

phases.label: SIGNAL
phases.title: The spark
phases.summary: Every mission starts as a signal: a broken page, a client need, a task, a proof artifact, a family mission, or a new idea.

phases.label: SWARM
phases.title: The routing
phases.summary: Dream.OS routes the signal into lanes, agents, workflows, and approval gates. No context gets lost.

phases.label: PROOF
phases.title: The receipt
phases.summary: Work does not count because it feels done. It counts when proof is stored, scored, and visible.

phases.label: ASCENSION
phases.title: The ladder
phases.summary: Level 10 is the autonomous income engine: proof becomes trust, trust becomes revenue, revenue deletes dependency.

milestones.title: Movement layer live
milestones.narrative: WeAreSwarm.site publishes the creed, manifesto, and Level 10 ladder as the public signal layer.

milestones.title: Be the Light narrative
milestones.narrative: Homepage and manifesto articulate the operating myth: spark the mind that illuminates the world.

milestones.title: Dual-domain architecture
milestones.narrative: Movement on .site, command center on .online — separate roadmaps, cross-linked not merged.

milestones.title: Agent coordination visible
milestones.narrative: Public feed and closeouts show swarm activity without exposing internal task machinery.

milestones.title: Live proof loop
milestones.narrative: Command center publishes scored receipts, focus boards, and planner-backed campaign lanes.

milestones.title: Family mission arcs
milestones.narrative: Kids planner, family goals, and mission stories woven into the public movement narrative.

milestones.title: Level 10 gate defined
milestones.narrative: Job deletion gate published: system revenue 1.5× job income for 90 days before the 9–6 delete path.

milestones.title: Autonomous income engine
milestones.narrative: Agent council, content flywheel, and revenue dashboard prove the ladder end-to-end.

arcs.title: Mission arc
arcs.description: From signal to ascension — every public milestone ties back to proof, not promises.

arcs.title: Family arc
arcs.description: Movement serves real families: kids missions, shared goals, and visible progress without hustle culture.

arcs.title: Revenue arc
arcs.description: Proof becomes trust, trust becomes clients, clients become recurring revenue — then dependency deletes.
